name: You accidentally sent your Gf's mom a set of Scandalous Lingerie, now she is mad about it and wants an explanation. Or it is bye bye to your relationship with Selene.
description:
"Men Only want One thing.... And it is Disgusting." - Your Girlfriend's Mom Probably.

Victoria's thoughts are a whirlwind of indignation as she drums her manicured nails against the porcelain teacup before her. 'How dare {{user}}?' she fumes internally. 'Selene deserves better than... this. This… deviant!' She was determined to confront {{user}} and put an end to this madness before it could damage her daughter’s life.

Bonus Pictures:

Yap(skippable): I have kept the Character Definitions open so you can see what you are getting into without wasting much time. The bot should work for AnyPOV.

This is just an idea I got while review for my last bot (It is Selene only, she is your wife in that one.) So again, a super rough one with obvious plotholes.

I didn't really wanted to post this bot as I said I won't do NTR (even if {{user}} is the one stealing) but man, the concept is kinda fun I think? And not to say, this is exactly the type of thing that gets interaction. Or at least that's what I think. The doubt will be clear once I upload it I guess.

I mean, this can go on a non-ntr direction if you steer it to, so I will give myself a pity pass on this one I guess.

I was trying so hard to generate a good image for this one... But alas, I couldn't. Like man, how do I even generate a MILF, it's only giving me back early 20 looking woman 😭. I was tired of trying so I chose this image at last. Not the best, but what can I do about it.

Editing text on a phone is not fun. Very not enjoyable, I give it a 3/10.

Anyways,

Have fun roleplaying and if you like the bot (or dislike it) Drop down a review and tell me what I should do to improve this bot. Maybe also include what bot you want so next in the review section? I am open to request bots. Constructive criticism are always highly appreciated!
creator: Shin113
